title: viburnum foetidum f. integrifolium
intro: Viburnum foetidum f. integrifolium, also known as the Fragrant Viburnum, is a plant species in the Adoxaceae family, characterized by its distinctive fragrance and dark green, entire leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viburnum foetidum f. integrifolium are believed to include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies, such as salves and poultices, to treat various health conditions.
